## Runtime.RecipeQuery.ganacheFatContent() method

Filter by ganache fat content range. Note: Calculates ganache for each recipe, which may be slow for large sets.

**Signature:**

```typescript
ganacheFatContent(min: Percentage, max?: Percentage): RecipeQuery;
```
